title: Quality pass: clippy pedantic cleanup in crossbridge-e2e
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

Run `cargo clippy -p crossbridge-e2e --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic` and resolve every warning (currently 57). Top categories: missing_errors_doc, cast_possible_truncation, map_unwrap_or, similar_names (`labels_a_after` vs `labels_b_after` — keep them, they're the most readable; allow `similar_names` for the e2e test specifically), too_many_lines (the round_trip test is intentionally a single linear narrative — allow `too_many_lines` on that fn with a comment), manual_assert.

Acceptance criteria:
- `cargo clippy -p crossbridge-e2e --all-targets -- -W clippy::pedantic -D warnings` exits 0.
- No blanket `#[allow(clippy::pedantic)]` or `#[allow(...)]` over whole modules — fix the underlying issues, only allow specific lints with a one-line justification comment when the pedantic suggestion is genuinely worse.
- The `submit_then_answer_round_trip` integration test must still run unconditionally (no `#[ignore]`) and pass.
- `cargo fmt --check` clean.
